tldr: C23 `pgvector-migration` resolved 2026-06-08 as done-by-prior-work — schema already existed in 0001_initial.py, no commit made (see D28). Next: Commit 24 `llm-service-impl` (Nova). One open handoff to Nova re: embedding dimension. No blockers.

open_handoffs.regarding: C24/C25 — embedding dimension must match policy_chunks.embedding column
open_handoffs.detail: policy_chunks.embedding is VECTOR(1536) (OpenAI text-embedding-3-small dimension), already live in 0001_initial.py and verified against the DB. Confirm your ingestion-time embedding provider before starting C25. If you choose Ollama (nomic-embed-text, 768-dim) instead of OpenAI, this column needs a follow-up migration to VECTOR(768) before any chunks can be inserted — flag that as its own commit before C25 begins ingestion.

replan_history.trigger: Phase 1 complete, Phase 2 scope now defined
replan_history.summary: Added 10 commits (C23-C32) implementing manifesto-spec.md §Phase 2 'Policy RAG': pgvector storage (C23), LLMService implementation (C24), document ingestion (C25), document upload routes (C26), RAG policy pipeline (C27), policy chat routes (C28), conversation persistence (C29), policy chat UI (C30), conversation sidebar UI (C31), citations UI (C32). No commits removed or reordered — pure addition after C22.

notes: C23 (`pgvector-migration`, Rex) resolved 2026-06-08 with NO git commit — investigation (Rex, on Eran's instruction to invoke him despite the scope already looking thin) found the entire pgvector/policy schema (extension, both tables, FKs, ivfflat index) already present in `0001_initial.py` lines 101-141, dated 2026-06-05 alongside the C06 model commit (`f712343`). Verified live: `alembic current` = 0001_initial (head), pgvector v0.8.2 active, tables/FKs/index/ORM mapping all correct. Writing a new migration would have duplicated DDL or falsified history; downgrading would have torn down the entire schema. Full record in DECISIONS.md D28. commit-protocol.md C23 marked done-by-prior-work; pointer advanced straight to C24 (Nova). Nova handoff re: VECTOR(1536) vs Ollama 768-dim recorded in open_handoffs above — must be resolved before C25 ingestion begins. || C22 committed 2026-06-07 (47bca18) — loginApi fixed to send JSON {email, password}, verified clean (tsc + network-level contract check by Claude). Eran then manually click-through-verified all 4 remaining browser checks: (1) /login form renders correctly, (2) admin login (admin@manifesto.local/admin123) redirects to /dashboard, (3) /dashboard shows 'Coming soon' placeholder, (4) manager login (manager.smoke@manifesto.local/manager123) navigating to /admin redirects away — to /login specifically. Item 4 initially looked surprising (redirecting an authenticated user to the login page), but Claude confirmed via ProtectedRoute.tsx (lines 12-18) that both the no-token AND wrong-role paths intentionally redirect to /login — documented by Aria in her C18 worklog. Logged as D25 (UX trade-off noted for possible Phase 2+ refinement, not a blocker). All C21 SMOKE_TEST_RESULTS.md items now resolved — Phase 1 formally closed 2026-06-07. Adam's throwaway manager user (manager.smoke@manifesto.local/manager123) remains in the dev DB as a useful fixture for future role-based testing. Phase 2 replan applied same day: C23-C32 added per manifesto-spec.md §Phase 2 (Policy RAG). Nova activated — identity file at .claude/agents/ai-engineer.md, first commit is C24. Sequence: C23(Rex) → C24(Nova) → {C25(Nova), C26(Rex)} → C27(Nova) → C28(Rex) → {C29(Rex), C30(Aria)} → C31(Aria) → C32(Aria). Viktor's next batch wave lands at C25 (every-5th-commit cadence continues from C20).
